# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release Workflow
on: [push]
jobs: 
 build_and_publish:
   runs-on: ubuntu-latest    # Use any Linux distribution here if needed    
   steps:                    
      - name: Checkout Repo      
        uses: actions/checkout@v2                                 
        
      - name: Build Application                       
        run: |                                                      
          npm ci --quiet                                     
          echo ${{ secrets.npm_token }} |  # Personal Access Token for NPM user 
            npm login --silent                                  
          $(cat ./package*.json)                              # List of packages to be built                    
        
      - name: Create Release Note                        
        run: |                                               
          VERSION=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/} 
                                       
          cat > release-notes.md << EOF  
          **Full Changelog**                                                            # Full changelogs and summary, only use if you have one                            
          $(grep '### Breaking' changeset)                                            # If breaking change was in version XYZ then provide a section for that                                       
        ${{ github.event.commits[0].message }}                                    # Use commit message of the tag as release notes, make sure to always include this if you have one                    
          EOF                                                                             .                                                      eof   )                              npm run build --if-changed                                   &&     echo "🚀 Building production bundle"                                mv dist /                             // publish packages  and create GitHub Release                       # Publish only when tag is vx.y.z or master                              
      - name: Create release                     
        uses: actions/create-release@v1                       
          if needed    run ${{ env.RELEASE_NAME }} as the title                         of this github action  to identify which releases were triggered by git tags     ## [skip ci]                                                       .                            &amp;lt;/div&gt;&quot;       mt-auto lint/check --fix
      - name: Publish Release                     npm publish                              release/*.zip                                  tarball='**/*.*',         repository=${{ env...   ,  authToken, run the following commands to upload package and then create a new GitHub draft https://github.com                            (    repo                                                                                      user+token&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span）
      - name: Upload Release Asset                    # publish packages                          zip='**/*.*',         repository=${{ env...   run the following commands to upload package and then create a new GitHub draft https://github.com                            (    repo                                                                                      user+token&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span）
